description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet with a rectangular body and a prominent backbox featuring a colorful marquee. The main body is deep blue, with a control panel at the front that includes a set of buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below. The playfield is visible under a glass cover, decorated with vibrant, pixelated artwork and game elements. The side panels display bold red text reading 'SHIDA MYOUJIN' alongside stylized, pixel-art graphics of a face and a character holding a trumpet. The cabinet stands on four metallic legs, giving it stability and elevating it off the ground.
description: A deep blue upright arcade game cabinet with pixel-art side graphics, a colorful marquee, and a control panel with buttons and a joystick. The cabinet features bold red text and stands on four metal legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and the colorful marquee artwork above the playfield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'SHIDA MYOUJIN' text in red and a pixel-art face graphic, with the cabinet's depth and backbox visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, solid blue back of the cabinet and the backbox, with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the 'SHIDA MYOUJIN' text and a pixel-art character holding a trumpet, with the control panel and playfield partially visible.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a visible bezel around the display area
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and three buttons, arranged in a row, with a red and white color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, featuring vibrant pixel-art graphics with a fantasy or action theme, including bold colors and stylized imagery
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Pixel-art graphics including a stylized face and a character with a trumpet, along with bold red text 'SHIDA MYOUJIN' on a blue background
